title: Olrla 2 Piece Tall Transparent Acrylic Flower Vase 40cm, Shatter-Proof Clear Cylinder Vase for Tall Branches 40 x 10cm and 40 x 12cm
features: 【Premium Material】The Acrylic flower vases are made from thickened highly transparent PET, will not shatter like glass or ceramic, easy to mantain, suitable for daily use in everywhere you want.
【Timeless Design】An elegent simple design vase with crystal-clear and shinny, ideal for wedding centerpieces, home office decorations, restaurant or flower shop presentations
【Set of Vases】These cylinder vases are 3pcs or 2pcs as a set, with different heights or sizes, could be accomodate with different fresh flower bouquent or dried floral arrangement.
【Indoor Flower Arrangement】These transparent plastic vases can be for flower arrangement for home, wedding table centerpieces, shops, events decor, creates vibrant and stylish scenes.

【Versatile Application】You can used to grow various green plants, fill them in artificial flowers, marbles, or favorite shells as a craft gift, or create microscopic scenes inside as an ornament, more funny original ideals are waiting for you to explore.
description: Product Description Olrla acrylic vases are made of high quality acrylic material and shatter-resistant, it boasts a crystal clear texture with a comfortable touch. Whether used for arranging flowers or DIY projects, you can find endless fun in it. It is a simple yet beautiful decoration and a must-have item. We offer a variety of acrylic vases in multiple sizes for you to choose from. A variety of different application scenarios

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Break Resistant, High Transparency, Holds Water, Lightweight, Weather Resistant
